headline: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Launches ICE GreenTrace Environmental Registry for Carbon Markets
summary: Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE:ICE) is one of the oversold tech stocks to buy now. On June 22, Intercontinental Exchange launched ICE GreenTrace, an environmental registry service that brings financial-grade infrastructure to the carbon credit market. The platform supports the full lifecycle of environmental instruments, including carbon credits and energy certificates, by utilizing the same technology that […]
